gaps.reason: `use mycelium_interp.budget::EffectKind` — `mycelium_interp.budget` is not a sibling module OR sibling phylum transpiled in this same batch (an external crate, `std`, or simply out of this batch's target set). Flagged, not guessed (VR-5/G2)

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " The **closed** v0 recovery-action set (RFC-0014 §4.4; §8 resolved)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Each variant is an explicit instruction to the [`crate::handle`] driver; together they cover"] # [doc = " the four recovery archetypes: substitute a value (`fallback`), re-attempt the operation"] # [doc = " (`retry`), redirect the error class (`escalate`), run a bounded cleanup and propagate"] # [doc = " (`cleanup_then_propagate`)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Guarantee tags (I2/VR-5 — recovery only ever downgrades)"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " - [`RecoveryAction::Fallback`]: the substituted value is honestly tagged **`Declared`**; a"] # [doc = "   fallback has no checked basis and can be at most `Declared`."] # [doc = " - [`RecoveryAction::Retry`]: inherits the successful attempt's **own** tag; on exhaustion no"] # [doc = "   value is produced and the original error propagates."] # [doc = " - [`RecoveryAction::Escalate`]: re-propagates — no recovered value, so no guarantee tag"] # [doc = "   question (the error's class is transformed, its identity is preserved)."] # [doc = " - [`RecoveryAction::CleanupThenPropagate`]: re-propagates the original error — same as above."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Never-silent (I1)"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " No action variant makes an error vanish. `Fallback` replaces it with an explicit value;"] # [doc = " `Retry` propagates the original on exhaustion; `Escalate` and `CleanupThenPropagate`"] # [doc = " re-propagate an explicit error. A handler using this closed set **cannot** express a \"drop\""] # [doc = " — the type enforces I1."] # [derive (Debug , Clone , PartialEq)] pub enum RecoveryAction < T > { # [doc = " Recover with an explicit fallback value."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " The recovered value is honestly tagged **`Declared`** (a substituted fallback has no"] # [doc = " checked basis — I2/VR-5). This is the **only** action with a fixed recovered tag; every"] # [doc = " other action either inherits its tag from the attempt or does not produce a value."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Never-silent (I1)"] # [doc = " Always yields `Recovered(value, Declared)` — never a drop."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Effects"] # [doc = " None — a pure value substitution."] Fallback { # [doc = " The fallback value (boxed to flatten the action enum's discriminant size)."] value : Box < T > , } , # [doc = " Re-attempt the operation, bounded by `max_attempts` (I4)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " On each attempt the driver calls the provided `attempt` thunk. If an attempt succeeds its"] # [doc = " value is recovered with its **own** honest guarantee (inherited, never upgraded — I2). If"] # [doc = " **all** `max_attempts` fail the **original** error continues to propagate (additive — I1)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Never-silent (I1)"] # [doc = " Either `Recovered` (from a successful attempt) or `Propagated(original_error)` on"] # [doc = " exhaustion. The original error is never discarded."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Effects"] # [doc = " Declares **`EffectKind::Retry`**, budgeted `Attempts(max_attempts)` (I4). A budget"] # [doc = " overrun is an explicit [`mycelium_interp::budget::EffectBudgetExhausted`], never a hang."] Retry { # [doc = " The maximum number of re-attempts (the budget ceiling, I4). `0` is valid and means"] # [doc = " **no retry** — the driver propagates the original error immediately (never a silent"] # [doc = " drop, I1); it is not a fabricated default."] max_attempts : u64 , } , # [doc = " Re-propagate under a different error-class *intent* — still explicit, never a recovered value."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " The escalation intent is captured in `to_class` and recorded in the acting [`crate::policy::PolicyRef`]"] # [doc = " (the content hash over all rules — C3 / EXPLAIN-able). It always re-propagates; there is"] # [doc = " no recovered value."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Limitation (Rust-first seam — honest, not hidden)"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " The **generic driver** (`handle_classified`) operates on an opaque `E` and **cannot"] # [doc = " physically re-type it** with the escalated class name.  The `to_class` is registered and"] # [doc = " hashed into the `PolicyRef`, but the propagated `error: E` value itself is unchanged at the"] # [doc = " type level.  In the `std.diag`-integrated form (once the M-510 / M-520 integration seam is"] # [doc = " reconciled) the driver would receive a `DiagError<E>` whose `Diag` record carries the"] # [doc = " escalated class — but that path requires the shared `ClassRegistry` from `mycelium-std-diag`"] # [doc = " (see `registry.rs`).  For now: the escalation is explicit and EXPLAIN-able via the"] # [doc = " `PolicyRef`, but the `E` payload is not re-typed."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Never-silent (I1)"] # [doc = " Always `Propagated(error)` — the error's existence is never hidden."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Effects"] # [doc = " None (a pure structural transform — the class intent is in the PolicyRef; the error continues)."] Escalate { # [doc = " The class to escalate into (registry-resolved name; X1)."] to_class : String , } , # [doc = " Run a **bounded** effect then let the original error continue (additive)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " The driver consumes `effect` from the ambient budget ledger (one enforcement mechanism —"] # [doc = " RFC-0014 §4.8 / `mycelium-interp`). A budget overrun skips the cleanup **only** — the"] # [doc = " original error propagates regardless (I1). The cleanup's budget overrun is noted in the"] # [doc = " returned [`crate::Resolution::Propagated`] as an optional `cleanup_overrun` flag so the"] # [doc = " failure is legible, not silently swallowed (spec §7-Q4 disposition: record it)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Never-silent (I1)"] # [doc = " The original error always propagates, whether the cleanup succeeds or overruns."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Effects"] # [doc = " Declares `effect`, budgeted in the [`mycelium_interp::budget::Budgets`] ledger (I4)."] CleanupThenPropagate { # [doc = " The declared cleanup effect (its budget is in the ambient ledger; I5)."] effect : EffectKind , } , }
gaps.reason: enum `RecoveryAction` has a named-field variant referencing a type not resolvable in-file — emitting it positionally would introduce an unresolved reference that poisons the file's `myc check`; left gapped under the M-1006 resolvability gate (VR-5/G2)
